content: Phase 1: Structural Cleanup - Break down 9,200-line main.rs monolith
Phase 2: Ratatui Infrastructure - Add dependencies and terminal lifecycle
Phase 3: Core Layout & Status Bar - Split-pane layout with status
Phase 4: Chat View - Rich conversation rendering with streaming
Phase 5: Sidebar & Task Panel - Persistent sidebar with tasks/files
Phase 6: Input & Commands - Multi-line input with slash commands
Phase 7: Polish & Integration - Production-quality finishing touches
